requirements.summary: Add a new 'Proxy' page accessible from the sidebar navigation that lists the three proxy services with a launch button for each, distinguishing the primary proxy visually
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Proxy' navigation entry appears in the sidebar alongside existing page links.
The Proxy page displays three cards: ProxySite, ProxyOrb, and ProxyProxy.
ProxyProxy card is visually marked as the primary/most-used proxy (e.g., 'Primary' badge, highlighted border).
Each card shows the proxy name, its URL (can be truncated for display), and a launch button.
Clicking the launch button on any card opens that proxy's URL through the app's existing tab/proxy navigation system.
The page styling is consistent with the existing amethyst/purple dark theme.

file_operations.description: Create the ProxyLinks page component that displays three proxy service cards (ProxySite, ProxyOrb, and ProxyProxy). Each card includes the proxy name, URL (truncated for display), and a launch button. The ProxyProxy card must be visually distinguished as primary with a badge and highlighted styling. Use useTabs hook to handle navigation when launch buttons are clicked. Style the page with glassmorphism effects and amethyst/purple theme colors consistent with the existing design system.

Add a 'Proxy' navigation button to the sidebar between 'Quick Open' and 'Education'. Include an appropriate icon (e.g., Globe or Network icon) and maintain the existing styling pattern with keyboard shortcut hint support. Wire the button to set the active page to 'proxy' when clicked.

Import the new ProxyLinks component and add a case for 'proxy' in the page routing logic to render the ProxyLinks component when the proxy page is active. Ensure the proxy page is included in the page state management alongside existing pages (home, games, ai, code, quickOpen, education).
